result.label: cortex-brain-v4
result.recipe: two-layer-colour (warm brand load-bearing + cool semantic structure-only) + restraint + sparing-diagrams + restore-yellow-anchor
result.fixes: Reverses v3 (render-003/004 lineage) brand-cold failure: cool semantic (green/blue/purple/teal) had been made load-bearing on CONTENT cards and warm yellow #ffde59 dropped (0 occurrences across 02/03/04/06). Restored warm as load-bearing; demoted cool to structure-only. Did NOT repeat v3's second overshoot — no design forced into SVG; HTML stays primary.

06-brain-anatomy.warm_anchor: 'THE MIND' kernel band + 'swap an organ, keep the mind' thesis both given yellow #ffde59 left-border
06-brain-anatomy.cool_demoted: region cards lost saturated coloured top-bar + coloured heading -> warm gold bar + ink heading; cool survives only as a small legend-key dot per card + the calm region legend
06-brain-anatomy.extra: organ-swap diagram amber #b96f24-on-tint swap pins neutralised to grey #6f675e (kills amber-orange-on-warm F3 risk)

03-four-memories.warm_anchor: 'ONE MIND' hub band given yellow #ffde59 left-border
03-four-memories.cool_demoted: four memory cards lost saturated bar + coloured heading -> warm gold bar + ink heading; cool kept only as small legend-key dot + the calm four-colour legend

02-brain-remembers.thread: HTML flow + one small spine diagram (kept)
02-brain-remembers.warm_anchor: 'one best-of answer' payoff box reskinned from green to cream + yellow #ffde59 left-border
02-brain-remembers.cool_demoted: three store cards lost saturated bar + coloured heading -> warm gold bar + ink heading; cool kept on the genuine spine flow diagram + small legend-key dots

04-brain-sleeps.thread: HTML ordered cycle + one small loop diagram (kept) — the spec's 'right use' of cool
04-brain-sleeps.warm_anchor: loop-diagram hub 'SLEEP' ring + label reskinned from teal to yellow #ffde59 ring with brown text
04-brain-sleeps.cool_demoted: step headings -> ink; numbered badges 1-5 -> brand amber #c8841a (licensed numbered-sequence use, small badge, white-on-amber not on-tint); cool kept as thin per-step left-border tying to the genuine cycle diagram + calm legend

result.two_tests: ROLE — cool now appears only on genuine structure (02 spine, 04 loop/ordered steps, legend keys/dots); content cards carry warm/neutral brand emphasis. DOMINANCE — every screen has >=1 bright yellow #ffde59 anchor and reads warm-neutral ground + sparing accent, not brand-cold.
result.data: MVC preserved — fixes were colour/treatment (view), so edits were in designs/NN-*/index.html; data/NN-*.json prose was already terse (one blurb per element) and ghost-text present, so left unchanged. index.html still fetches its data, never inlines. meta.source + commit_sha a129a5d50ba8a140c288b6f2eb03ddadcee873a9 preserved.
result.scope: Only the four cortex designs touched (02-brain-remembers, 03-four-memories, 04-brain-sleeps, 06-brain-anatomy). 01-session-journey and 05-dark-factory left untouched. Regenerated in place on the running :7422 server; no new port.
result.verified: #ffde59 now present in all four (was 0): 02=1, 03=1, 04=2, 06=1. HTTP 200 on :7422 for all four designs + designs/index.html. Playwright full-page screenshots of 06 (worst case) and 04 (cycle) confirm warm anchors read and cool is demoted to structure/legend; only console error is a benign favicon 404.
